mdSummary:
# Link

Styled anchor with underline + color variants.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Typography
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/link

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Link | Href | `string?` | `` |  |
| Link | External | `bool` | `` |  |
| Link | Variant | `string` | `"default"` |  |
| Link | Size | `string?` | `` |  |
| Link | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| Link | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| Link | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
